tasks.prompt: You are redesigning Settlements CRM. Read components/crm.tsx, components/layout/sidebar.tsx, app/globals.css, and components/ui/*. Recreate a clearer, easier-to-understand dark dashboard UI in this .pen file. Start with app shell + Dashboard + Negociables + NSF Tickets screens. Use existing design variables. Group KPIs by category, add section headers, improve table scannability, and design a mobile nav drawer.
Extend the design with Finance module screens: Client Deposits, Creditor Payments Overview, Revenue, and Alerts. Keep visual consistency with the dashboard redesign.
Extend the design with Settlement module screens: Creditor Status, Monthly Settlements, Futures, Broken, No Posibles, and Settlement Plan. Emphasize risk status colors and actionable columns.
